name: Tumblr
description: Access Tumblr API to manage blog posts, reblogs, dashboard, and tagged content.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
## Tumblr API

Manage Tumblr blogs, create and reblog posts, and access the dashboard and tagged content through the Tumblr API.

**Note:** Get your OAuth credentials at [Tumblr Apps](https://www.tumblr.com/oauth/apps). Some endpoints also require an `api_key` query parameter.

Authorization.description: Tumblr OAuth 2.0 access token (Environment variable: TUMBLR_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: Get Blog Info
tools.description: Get general information about a Tumblr blog.

blog_identifier.description: The blog identifier - standard or custom blog name (e.g. myblog.tumblr.com or myblog)

api_key.description: Your Tumblr application API key (Consumer Key)

tools.name: Get Blog Posts
tools.description: Get published posts from a Tumblr blog.

type.description: Post type filter: text, quote, link, answer, video, audio, photo, chat

limit.description: Number of posts to return (default 20, max 20)

offset.description: Post number to start at for pagination

notes_info.description: Whether to return notes information with each post

tools.name: Get Specific Post
tools.description: Get a specific post from a Tumblr blog by post ID.

id.description: The ID of the specific post to retrieve

tools.name: Create Post
tools.description: Create a new post on a Tumblr blog.

type.description: Post type: text, photo, quote, link, chat, audio, video

title.description: Title of the post (for text posts)

body.description: Body text of the post (HTML allowed for text posts)

tags.description: Comma-separated list of tags for the post

state.description: Post state: published, draft, queue, private

format.description: Format of the body: html, markdown

source_url.description: Source URL for link or photo posts

tools.name: Reblog Post
tools.description: Reblog a post from another Tumblr blog to your blog.

blog_identifier.description: Your blog identifier that will host the reblog

id.description: The ID of the post to reblog

reblog_key.description: The reblog key of the post (obtained from post data)

comment.description: Comment to add to the reblog

native_inline_images.description: If true, inline images are converted to native image blocks

tools.name: Get Dashboard
tools.description: Get posts from the authenticated user's Tumblr dashboard.

limit.description: Number of posts to return (default 20, max 20)

offset.description: Post number to start at for pagination

type.description: Filter by post type: text, photo, quote, link, chat, audio, video, answer

since_id.description: Return posts with ID greater than this value

tools.name: Get Tagged Posts
tools.description: Get posts tagged with a specific tag across all of Tumblr.

tag.description: The tag to search for (without the # symbol)

before.description: Unix timestamp - return posts published before this time

limit.description: Number of posts to return (default 20, max 20)

filter.description: Filtering level: text (plain text), raw (no filter)

tools.name: Get Followers
tools.description: Get a list of followers for a Tumblr blog.

limit.description: Number of followers to return (default 20, max 20)

offset.description: Follower number to start at for pagination
